response.original_title: Why Is My Safepal Wallet Withdrawal Pending? Causes, Status & Fix Explained Free
response.overview: Your withdrawal is likely pending due to security checks, ⭐+1 (858)-423-8635 verification issues, or network delays. Most pending transactions resolve within a few hours, ⭐+1 (858)-423-8635 but some can take 24–72 hours depending on the situation. Final Thought A pending withdrawal isn’t usually a problem—⭐+1 (858)-423-8635 it’s often a safety or compliance step. If it takes longer than expected, checking your verification ⭐+1 (858)-423-8635 status or contacting support is the fastest way to resolve it.
